title: The Man Who Japed (Ace Double D-193)
author: Philip K. Dick
card_summary: The original 1956 Ace Double edition of Dick's satirical novel about a future moralistic society where Allen Purcell, a propaganda agency director, discovers he has been unconsciously vandalizing the statue of the regime's founder. An early exploration of repression and subversion.

assets.path: PaulPKDarchive/PKDpdf/[Ace Double D-193 ] Dick, Philip K - The Man Who Japed (1956, Ace) - libgen.li.cbr
